attacking_style: Opportunistic attacker who exploits race neutralizations and tactical confusion. Strikes when GC teams call truces, launching decisive moves inside final 10km from breakaway positions.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaways without visible team support. Relies on positioning within front groups rather than domestique-led setups to create winning opportunities.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preference. Won from breakaway in chaotic stage finish conditions rather than pure terrain suitability.
vulnerability: Reliance on breakaway success and race chaos suggests vulnerability in controlled bunch sprints or when GC teams maintain high pace. Lacks visible team support for sustained efforts.
key_patterns: Exploits tactical confusion and neutralization scenarios to attack when opponents negotiate
Attacks breakaway companions rather than bridging alone, showing superior positioning instincts
Strikes decisively inside 10km when GC contenders disengage from stage outcome
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated superior form to drop breakaway companions and exploit tactical situation for stage win
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 2
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 2
